title: Hut 8 Pivots From Bitcoin to AI With $7B Google-Backed Deal to Power Data Centers
text: HUT Pivot to AI Infrastructure. Hut 8 shifts from Bitcoin to AI with major deal backed by Google. River Bend data center supported by Google-backed lease arrangement. $7 billion contract value with Fluidstack (Google-backed). Represents strategic diversification away from Bitcoin mining volatility. Access to institutional investment-grade financing demonstrates market confidence. 245 MW capacity with expansion potential to 1,330 MW.
